videos.r2Url: TBD — provision R2 bucket and paste URL here before Phase 2

_cdnDocs.devNote: srcUrl empty in dev; Vite dev server serves public/videos/ at /videos/ path
_cdnDocs.productionCDN: Cloudflare R2 bucket (free tier: 10 GB storage, 10M reads/mo, zero egress cost)
_cdnDocs.jsDelivrWarning: jsDelivr CANNOT serve GitHub LFS files — it receives the 128-byte LFS pointer, not the binary. Do NOT use jsDelivr for *.mp4 tracked in LFS.
_cdnDocs.swapInstruction: To enable production video: (1) provision R2 bucket, (2) upload placeholder.mp4 to R2, (3) copy the r2.dev or custom-domain URL into srcUrl for the placeholder entry, (4) rebuild and redeploy
_cdnDocs.VIDEO_BASE_URL: VITE_VIDEO_BASE_URL env var wires the CDN base — lands in Phase 6 (CONTENT-03)
_cdnDocs.phase6Note: CONTENT-03: env-conditional srcUrl wiring (VITE_VIDEO_BASE_URL) lands in Phase 6
